texto: failure is normal expression of an action's re-action. learning is secondary in this process .it is only prime to recognize true capacity within ourselves.it is a tool to transform the same person in new one with new value and outlook towards the same old world.
explicacao: Citação de ratna m.munshi sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “failure is normal expression of an action's re-action. learning is secondary in this process .it …” articula reflexao, failure, action em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao.
